title: Extract honey
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Extract honey demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to extract honey

pcs.text: Identify and select appropriate extraction method and equipment for type of honey production used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select appropriate extraction method and equipment for type of honey production used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select appropriate extraction method and equipment for type of honey production used.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and take action to minimise risks to self and others
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and take action to minimise risks to self and others?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and take action to minimise risks to self and others.

pcs.text: Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Ensure extraction equipment and storage containers are clean, dry, sanitised and serviceable according to workplace procedures, sanitiser product labels and safety data sheets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure extraction equipment and storage containers are clean, dry, sanitised and serviceable according to workplace procedures, sanitiser product labels and safety data sheets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure extraction equipment and storage containers are clean, dry, sanitised and serviceable according to workplace procedures, sanitiser product labels and safety data sheets.

pcs.text: Undertake personal hygiene requirements according to workplace and food safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake personal hygiene requirements according to workplace and food safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake personal hygiene requirements according to workplace and food safety procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to extract honey

elements.title: Prepare unprocessed honey comb

pcs.text: Identify, select and reserve frames or sections for unprocessed honey comb according to workplace product and customer requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, select and reserve frames or sections for unprocessed honey comb according to workplace product and customer requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, select and reserve frames or sections for unprocessed honey comb according to workplace product and customer requirements.

pcs.text: Separate and clean sections or divide comb according to workplace product requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Separate and clean sections or divide comb according to workplace product requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Separate and clean sections or divide comb according to workplace product requirements.

pcs.text: Package, label and store raw honeycomb according to workplace quality assurance, food safety, handling and packaging requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Package, label and store raw honeycomb according to workplace quality assurance, food safety, handling and packaging requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Package, label and store raw honeycomb according to workplace quality assurance, food safety, handling and packaging requirements.

pcs.text: Identify and comply with quality assurance and food safety and handling requirements throughout the process of extracting honey
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and comply with quality assurance and food safety and handling requirements throughout the process of extracting honey?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and comply with quality assurance and food safety and handling requirements throughout the process of extracting honey.

pcs.text: Inspect comb visually for areas of brood and prepare comb to avoid damage to brood
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect comb visually for areas of brood and prepare comb to avoid damage to brood?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect comb visually for areas of brood and prepare comb to avoid damage to brood.

pcs.text: Prepare comb to assist the extraction process according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare comb to assist the extraction process according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare comb to assist the extraction process according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Expose the honey by decapping or breaking comb avoiding unnecessary damage to cells, frames and hive components according to extraction method selected
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Expose the honey by decapping or breaking comb avoiding unnecessary damage to cells, frames and hive components according to extraction method selected?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Expose the honey by decapping or breaking comb avoiding unnecessary damage to cells, frames and hive components according to extraction method selected.

pcs.text: Operate the extraction equipment to remove honey from comb according to equipment operation instructions and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate the extraction equipment to remove honey from comb according to equipment operation instructions and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate the extraction equipment to remove honey from comb according to equipment operation instructions and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Remove frames from extractor and return to supers according to extraction method, workplace and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove frames from extractor and return to supers according to extraction method, workplace and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove frames from extractor and return to supers according to extraction method, workplace and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Store extracted supers in suitable bee and pest proof facility awaiting return to apiary according to workplace pest management and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store extracted supers in suitable bee and pest proof facility awaiting return to apiary according to workplace pest management and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store extracted supers in suitable bee and pest proof facility awaiting return to apiary according to workplace pest management and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Return frames to apiary according to workplace barrier system and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Return frames to apiary according to workplace barrier system and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Return frames to apiary according to workplace barrier system and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Reserve frames due for rotation or damaged and store for wax extraction or repair according to workplace, quarantine and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Reserve frames due for rotation or damaged and store for wax extraction or repair according to workplace, quarantine and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Reserve frames due for rotation or damaged and store for wax extraction or repair according to workplace, quarantine and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Ensure extracted honey meets temperature specifications to assist removal of wax, air, pollen and detritus
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure extracted honey meets temperature specifications to assist removal of wax, air, pollen and detritus?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure extracted honey meets temperature specifications to assist removal of wax, air, pollen and detritus.

pcs.text: Test moisture content of honey and take action to maintain appropriate moisture according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test moisture content of honey and take action to maintain appropriate moisture according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test moisture content of honey and take action to maintain appropriate moisture according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor conditions of honey fermentation and implement procedures to reduce risk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor conditions of honey fermentation and implement procedures to reduce risk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor conditions of honey fermentation and implement procedures to reduce risk.

pcs.text: Store cleaned honey in containers to meet quality assurance standards, food health regulations and customer requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store cleaned honey in containers to meet quality assurance standards, food health regulations and customer requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store cleaned honey in containers to meet quality assurance standards, food health regulations and customer requirements.

pcs.text: Obtain a reference sample of honey, label and store according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain a reference sample of honey, label and store according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain a reference sample of honey, label and store according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Clean, dry and sanitise all equipment and work area according to workplace procedures.
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, dry and sanitise all equipment and work area according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, dry and sanitise all equipment and work area according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify comb suitable for future wax processing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify comb suitable for future wax processing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify comb suitable for future wax processing.

pcs.text: Extract residual honey from cappings and raw comb according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Extract residual honey from cappings and raw comb according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Extract residual honey from cappings and raw comb according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Consolidate wax cappings and raw comb and store according to workplace, quarantine and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consolidate wax cappings and raw comb and store according to workplace, quarantine and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consolidate wax cappings and raw comb and store according to workplace, quarantine and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Update records for honey production according to workplace procedures and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Update records for honey production according to workplace procedures and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Update records for honey production according to workplace procedures and legislative requirements.
